dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes selective entry on market inefficiencies with high confidence. ADX_14 > 65 proxies 'market regime confidence > 65%' and directional strength. RSI_14 percentile thresholds (60th and 45th) operationalized as numeric levels. Entry requires both conditions (AND logic). Exit triggers when signal strength decays (RSI reversal below 45th percentile threshold). Dual long/short rules accommodate CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction. Max holding period set to 40 bars as specified.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes selective entry on market inefficiencies with high confidence. ADX_14 > 65 proxies 'market regime confidence > 65%' and directional strength. RSI_14 percentile thresholds (60th and 45th) operationalized as numeric levels. Entry requires both conditions (AND logic). Exit triggers when signal strength decays (RSI reversal below 45th percentile threshold). Dual long/short rules accommodate CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction. Max holding period set to 40 bars as specified.

source_rule_text: A trader should be selective in identifying market inefficiencies and take positions only when warranted, rather than maintaining continuous market exposure based on the assumption that opportunities exist perpetually.
